entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an agriculture research center

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, an informal association supporting international research centers

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that promote long-term environmental and social health

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions with lower industrialization and economic development

entities.name: EXTERNAL REVIEWS
entities.description: A mechanism of transparency and accountability used to monitor the quality of science

entities.name: EXTERNAL PROGRAM REVIEWS (EPR)
entities.description: CGIAR-commissioned comprehensive external assessments of a Center's program and management

entities.name: CENTER COMMISSIONED EXTERNAL REVIEWS (CCERS)
entities.description: External reviews commissioned by the research center itself

entities.name: RESEARCH QUALITY
entities.description: The standard and effectiveness of science and research outputs

entities.name: PROGRAM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The leadership, efficiency, and administration of research programs
